name: Sausage and Cabbage Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Cabbage, cored and cut into -1-inch pieces
16 oz Can whole peeled tomatoes, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble sausage into a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole and add onion.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 7 minutes or until sausage is cooked and onion is tender. Stir frequently. Drain off excess fat.
3. Add cabbage, tomatoes, sugar, oregano, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
4. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 8 to 10 minutes or until cabbage is tender.
5. In a small bowl mix flour and cold water until smooth.
6. Gradually stir the flour mixture into sausage mixture.
7. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, stirring frequently until thickened.
